cancel(uint256).notice: Sender cancels the stream.         Recipient gets earned amount up to now.         Sender gets remaining unearned USDC back.

topUp(uint256,uint256).notice: Sender adds more USDC to extend the stream duration.

withdraw(uint256).notice: Recipient withdraws all earned USDC so far.         Can be called multiple times — only unwithdran earned amount is sent.

withdrawable(uint256).notice: How much USDC the recipient can withdraw right now
